name: gsd-new-project-workflow
purpose: Full new-project initialization: deep questioning -> research (4x parallel gsd-project-researcher) -> synthesis -> roadmap creation. Stores artifacts in .planning/.
notes: Plugin canonical source at ~/.claude/get-shit-done/ v1.22.4. npm package get-shit-done-cc v1.37.1 is latest. SoNash runs an older installed version. gsd-nyquist-auditor exists in plugin but NOT in SoNash's agents/global/ - 11 vs 12 agents.

name: gsd-plan-phase-workflow
purpose: Phase planning pipeline: optional research -> planner creates PLAN.md files -> plan-checker verifies goal coverage -> revision loop if issues found.
notes: Planner supports --gaps mode for gap-closure planning from verification failures. Plan-checker has 6 verification dimensions: requirement coverage, task completeness, dependency correctness, key links, scope sanity, must_haves derivation.

name: gsd-execute-phase-workflow
purpose: Atomic plan execution: per-task commits, deviation handling (4 rules), authentication gates, checkpoint protocol, SUMMARY.md creation, STATE.md update.
notes: Executor has 4 deviation rules: auto-fix bugs, auto-add critical missing functionality, auto-fix blockers, ask for architectural changes. Supports TDD mode (tdd=true task attribute) with RED-GREEN-REFACTOR cycle. Checkpoint types: human-verify (90%), decision (9%), human-action (1%). References summary template @~/.claude/get-shit-done/templates/summary.md.

name: gsd-verify-phase-workflow
purpose: Goal-backward phase verification: verifier checks codebase against must_haves (truths, artifacts 3-level, key_links), integration-checker verifies cross-phase wiring and E2E flows.
notes: Verifier checks artifacts at 3 levels: existence, substantive (line count + stub patterns + exports), wired (imported + used). Key link patterns: Component->API, API->Database, Form->Handler, State->Render. Gap output in YAML frontmatter consumed by gsd:plan-phase --gaps. Re-verification mode: failed items get full check, passed items get quick regression only.

name: gsd-debug-workflow
purpose: Scientific-method debugging with persistent debug file state, checkpoint protocol, and optional diagnose-only mode.
notes: Debug file status machine: gathering -> investigating -> fixing -> verifying -> resolved. Modes: goal=find_root_cause_only (diagnose only) vs goal=find_and_fix (default). Supports symptoms_prefilled=true for UAT/diagnose-issues workflow. Archives resolved sessions to .planning/debug/resolved/. Biggest agent in GSD family at 37,960 bytes.

name: gsd-map-codebase-workflow
purpose: Codebase analysis across 4 focus areas (tech, arch, quality, concerns) producing structured documents consumed by planner and executor.
notes: Spawns up to 4 parallel mapper agents, one per focus area. Output documents: STACK.md, INTEGRATIONS.md (tech), ARCHITECTURE.md, STRUCTURE.md (arch), CONVENTIONS.md, TESTING.md (quality), CONCERNS.md (concerns). Documents are prescriptive (not descriptive) for executor use. All templates embedded in agent body.

name: gsd-plugin-infrastructure
purpose: GSD plugin bundle: npm package get-shit-done-cc installs workflows->commands, agent templates, templates, references, bin/gsd-tools.cjs, and the update-check hook.
notes: npm package: get-shit-done-cc. Current installed: 1.22.4. Latest available: 1.37.1 (update available). Plugin NOT in ~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json - installed separately via npm, not the Claude Code plugin marketplace. Install path: ~/.claude/get-shit-done/. File manifest tracked at ~/.claude/gsd-file-manifest.json (SHA256 hashes for integrity verification). Update check writes to ~/.claude/cache/gsd-update-check.json on each SessionStart. SoNash also has a project-level gsd-check-update.js and a user-level hook that both fire on SessionStart. The plugin also installs 3 hooks into ~/.claude/hooks/: gsd-check-update.js, gsd-context-monitor.js, gsd-statusline.js.

name: gsd-check-update
purpose: Spawns detached background process to check npm registry for GSD updates; writes result to ~/.claude/cache/gsd-update-check.json. Runs once per SessionStart.
notes: Uses spawn(detached:true) + child.unref() so Claude Code doesn't wait. Has symlink guard (refuses to write through symlinks). Hardcoded npm package name: get-shit-done-cc. SoNash project-scoped version fires from .claude/hooks/global/ via settings.json SessionStart hook. User-level copy at ~/.claude/hooks/gsd-check-update.js. module_system: cjs

name: gsd-codebase-mapper
purpose: Explores codebase for a specific focus area (tech/arch/quality/concerns) and writes analysis documents directly to .planning/codebase/. Spawned by /gsd:map-codebase.
notes: File size: 15,738 bytes. All 7 output document templates embedded in agent body. Documents consumed by gsd-planner and gsd-executor. Returns confirmation only (not document contents) to reduce orchestrator context.

name: gsd-debugger
purpose: Investigates bugs using scientific method, manages persistent debug file state, handles checkpoints. Spawned by /gsd:debug and diagnose-issues workflow.
notes: File size: 37,960 bytes - largest GSD agent. Supports symptoms_prefilled and goal: find_root_cause_only modes. Debug file is the persistent brain - survives /clear. Contains extensive investigation technique library (binary search, rubber duck, minimal reproduction, working backwards, differential debugging, git bisect).

name: gsd-executor
purpose: Executes GSD PLAN.md files atomically with per-task commits, 4-rule deviation handling, TDD support, checkpoint protocol, SUMMARY.md creation, and STATE.md updates.
notes: File size: 21,335 bytes. 4 deviation rules with clear escalation: R1=auto-fix bugs, R2=auto-add missing critical, R3=auto-fix blockers, R4=ask for architectural (STOP+checkpoint). Commit format: {type}({phase}-{plan}): {description}. Performance tracking via shell time vars (PLAN_START_EPOCH). Summary template @~/.claude/get-shit-done/templates/summary.md uses @ reference.

name: gsd-integration-checker
purpose: Verifies cross-phase integration and E2E flows. Checks exports are imported and used, APIs have consumers, auth protection is wired, and user flows complete end-to-end.
notes: File size: 12,563 bytes. Key principle: existence != integration. Checks 4 directions: exports->imports, APIs->consumers, forms->handlers, data->display. Returns YAML wiring/flow status for milestone auditor. Read-only agent (no Write tool).

name: gsd-phase-researcher
purpose: Researches how to implement a specific phase well, producing RESEARCH.md consumed by gsd-planner. Spawned by /gsd:plan-phase and /gsd:research-phase.
notes: File size: 19,646 bytes. Source hierarchy: Context7 (HIGH) > Official Docs (HIGH) > WebSearch verified (MEDIUM) > WebSearch only (LOW). Supports /deep-research escalation when LOW confidence detected. CONTEXT.md from /gsd:discuss-phase constrains scope. Uses mcp__context7__* wildcard.

name: gsd-plan-checker
purpose: Verifies PLAN.md files will achieve the phase goal before execution. Goal-backward analysis across 6 dimensions. Spawned by /gsd:plan-phase after planner creates plans.
notes: File size: 20,742 bytes. 6 verification dimensions: requirement_coverage, task_completeness, dependency_correctness, key_links_planned, scope_sanity (2-3 tasks target / 5+ blocker), verification_derivation. Returns PASSED or ISSUES FOUND with YAML issue list for planner revision. Read-only (no Write/Edit).

name: gsd-planner
purpose: Creates executable PLAN.md files with task breakdown, dependency waves, goal-backward must_haves. Spawned by /gsd:plan-phase and /gsd:plan-phase --gaps.
notes: File size: 44,624 bytes - second largest GSD agent. Plans ARE prompts (not documents that become prompts). 4 discovery levels. Context quality degradation model: 0-30%=PEAK, 30-50%=GOOD, 50-70%=DEGRADING, 70%+=POOR. Anti-enterprise: no RACI, no sprints, no time estimates. Uses mcp__context7__* wildcard.

name: gsd-project-researcher
purpose: Researches domain ecosystem before roadmap creation. Produces 5 files in .planning/research/ (STACK, FEATURES, ARCHITECTURE, PITFALLS per focus area). Spawned 4x in parallel by /gsd:new-project.
notes: File size: 24,308 bytes. Spawned 4x in parallel (each handles one focus: stack/features/architecture/pitfalls). Writes files but does NOT commit - synthesizer commits everything. Can escalate to /deep-research via GSD adapter for high-stakes projects. Uses mcp__context7__* wildcard.

name: gsd-research-synthesizer
purpose: Synthesizes outputs from 4 parallel gsd-project-researcher agents into SUMMARY.md. Commits ALL research files (researchers write but don't commit). Spawned after all 4 researchers complete.
notes: File size: 7,367 bytes - smallest GSD agent. Read-only except for Write (SUMMARY.md) and Bash (git commit). References template: ~/.claude/get-shit-done/templates/research-project/SUMMARY.md. Commits in one shot: STACK + FEATURES + ARCHITECTURE + PITFALLS + SUMMARY.

name: gsd-roadmapper
purpose: Creates project roadmaps from requirements with phase breakdown, 100% coverage validation, goal-backward success criteria, and initializes STATE.md. Spawned by /gsd:new-project.
notes: File size: 16,866 bytes. Derives phases from requirements (not imposed structure). Depth calibration: Quick=3-5 phases, Standard=5-8, Comprehensive=8-12. Coverage is non-negotiable: every v1 requirement maps to exactly one phase. Decimal phases (2.1, 2.2) for urgent insertions via /gsd:insert-phase.

name: gsd-verifier
purpose: Verifies phase goal achievement through goal-backward analysis. Checks codebase delivers what phase promised (not just tasks completed). Creates VERIFICATION.md report.
notes: File size: 22,592 bytes. Critical: NEVER trust SUMMARY.md claims - verify actual code. Artifact 3-level check: exists/substantive/wired. Re-verification mode optimizes by only fully checking failed items. Does NOT commit - orchestrator does. Gap YAML frontmatter is machine-readable for plan-phase --gaps. Read-only (no Write/Edit in tools).

name: gsd-nyquist-auditor
purpose: Fills Nyquist validation gaps by generating minimal behavioral tests and verifying coverage for phase requirements. Spawned by /gsd:validate-phase.
notes: Present in plugin (~/.claude/agents/) but NOT in SoNash's .claude/agents/global/ - appears to be a newer plugin agent not yet copied to SoNash's project-level mirror. skills: [gsd-nyquist-auditor-workflow] field present (unusual for global agents which typically have NO skills field). Implementation files READ-ONLY - only creates test files, fixtures, VALIDATION.md. Max 3 debug iterations per gap.
